title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do you prefer to communicate – by text, phone call or face to face? Why?
Do you think the way people communicate has changed significantly in your lifetime?
Are you good at expressing your opinions? Do you find it easy or difficult?
Do you think people today are better or worse at listening to each other?
How do you handle disagreements with people you care about?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think technology has made communication more or less effective?
How important are non-verbal skills in everyday communication?
Do you think people are becoming less patient when communicating with others?
